name: Chicken Saute with Summer Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into approximately 3/4 inch cubes.
2. Cut zucchini into thick slices.
3. Place eggplant and zucchini in a colander, sprinkle generously with salt and let stand for 30 minutes.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. Sprinkle chicken pieces with salt and pepper, add to the pan and brown well on both sides; add more oil as needed.
5. Return all chicken to the pan, reduce heat to simmer, cover, and cook until almost done for about 20 minutes.
6. Slice onions, cut peppers into squares, mince garlic, and chop tomatoes.
7. Pat eggplant and zucchini dry.
8. In a Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons oil over high heat and add half of the eggplant. Cook, stirring, until browned and softened for about 5 minutes; remove and repeat with remaining eggplant, adding more oil as needed.
9. In the same skillet, brown zucchini for about 5 minutes. Add to the cooked eggplant. Add remaining 1 tablespoon oil to the pan, reduce heat to low, and sauté onions, red and green peppers. Cover and cook until softened for about 15 minutes.
10. Stir in garlic; add eggplant and zucchini. Cover and simmer with chicken until very soft for about an hour. Heat through for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Serve hot, sprinkled with fresh chopped basil.
